mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status != 'deleted' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, title, description, price, original_price, `condition`, category, images, seller_id, status, view_count, favorite_count, location, campus, tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{condition}, #{category}, #{images}, #{sellerId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{location}, #{campus}, #{tags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET favorite_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
